name: creepwave-forge
description: Run Creepwave Forge step-by-step orchestration from Codex using local MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Run role-based Forge workflows step by step
interface.longDescription: Creepwave Forge routes Codex tasks through one active role at a time, validates runtime handoff contracts, persists role artifacts on a run branch, and requires human approval before each transition.
defaultPrompt: Run Forge for this project task
